title: Business Insider: Trump’s Green Card Memo Dropped Before a Holiday Weekend. Immigration Lawyers Say Clients Panicked. | Fragomen, Del Rey, Bernsen & Loewy LLP
content:
## Business Insider: Trump’s Green Card Memo Dropped Before a Holiday Weekend. Immigration Lawyers Say Clients Panicked.

A late-week USCIS memo on green card adjustment of status rules prompted swift questions from employers managing foreign national employees. In an article published in Business Insider , Counsel Brian Hunt highlighted that employers were seeking clarity on how the updated guidance could affect immigration timelines and work authorization continuity. He added that the main focus was understanding potential impacts on employee mobility and planning.
